# TBH: Task Bar Hero Wiki
A community-maintained database and guide site for TBH: Task Bar Hero (Steam App 3678970).

## Site Structure
- / — Homepage with item database stats, hero overview, market prices
- /items — 5,944 item database (gear, materials, stage boxes)
- /items/{slug} — Individual item page with drop heatmap, stats, market price
- /heroes — 6 hero classes comparison with radar charts and stat matrix
- /heroes/{slug} — Hero detail with skills, stat priority, build links
- /monsters — 61 monster bestiary with portraits and spawn data
- /monsters/{slug} — Monster detail with stage appearances
- /map — Interactive stage map (DNF-style) with boss portraits
- /stages/{key} — Stage detail with drop tables
- /market — Steam Community Market price tracking
- /chests — Stage boss and monster box database
- /runes — Interactive rune tree planner (197 runes, 4 recommended routes)
- /cube — Hero-dric Cube system: 6 material types with effects
- /buffs — 29 buffs and debuffs with stat modifiers
- /effects — 79 material effects by equipment slot
- /pets — 8 pets with unlock conditions and best farming stages
- /guides — Game guides (beginner, farming, economy, cube)
- /guides/farming — Farming hub with gold/EXP stage rankings
- /builds — 6 hero build routes (early/mid/endgame)
- /tools/farming-calculator — 3-mode farming calculator (find drops, stage drops, compare)
- /tools/profit-calculator — Profit estimation tool
- /about — About the site
- /faq — Frequently asked questions

## Data Sources
- Game data: datamined from TBH: Task Bar Hero v1.00.09 game files
- Market data: Steam Community Market API
- Drop data: community-sourced chest drop rates

## Languages
/ (English), /zh (Chinese), /ja (Japanese), /ko (Korean)
